title: OUTPATIENT PROGRAMS - 211info
text: GRANTS PASS OUTPATIENT PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers comprehensive outpatient treatment for substance use, mental health, and co-occurring conditions. Also provides gambling disorder counseling, partial hospitalization, and day treatment. 690 Rouge River Highway Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Outpatient: Unrestricted Partial hospitalization or day treatment: Individuals with severe mental illness and substance use disorders Hours: Monday-Saturday 8am-5pm (541) 955-9227 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 955-9227 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Outpatient: Walk in or call for more information Partial Hospitalization or Day Treatment: Must be referred FEES: Oregon Health Plan (OHP) private insurance, sliding scale fees available for uninsured clients DOCUMENTS: Insurance card, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-7pm, Saturday 8am-5pm Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Gambling Disorder Counseling Psychiatric Day Treatment Substance Use Disorder Day Treatment If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GRANTS PASS
